member.name: M:GTA.World.ShootBullet(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Ped,GTA.WeaponAsset,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Fires a single bullet in the world
member.param: Where the bullet is fired from.
Where the bullet is fired to.

The
who fired the bullet, leave
for no one.
The weapon that the bullet is fired from.
The damage the bullet will cause.
The speed, only affects projectile weapons, leave -1 for default.
